headline: Outpatient & Specialty Care Stocks Q4 Earnings Review: DaVita (NYSE:DVA) Shines
summary: Quarterly earnings results are a good time to check in on a company’s progress, especially compared to its peers in the same sector. Today we are looking at DaVita (NYSE:DVA) and the best and worst performers in the outpatient & specialty care industry.
